column1: # OPC UA example — copied from protocol-opcua/sample-configs/config.csv
# address   = OPC UA node ID (e.g. ns=2;s=TagName)
# datatype  = bool | float | int | string | (empty = auto-detect)
# byteorder = ABCD | CDAB | BADC | DCBA (endianness; ABCD = big-endian)
# resolution = decimal places to keep (0 = integer)
# server    = full OPC UA endpoint URL — must match protocol.server in sys_parameters.json
# isarray   = yes | no — whether the node is an OPC UA array node
# arrayindex = integer index into the array node (0 for scalars or first element)
